title: Flamingo - Software update for headset and charge case
scenario: DFU update for both headset and charge case completes successfully via "Update All" button in Device Settings Software Update tab
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset and charge case are connected and visible on the Home screen.
Tap the update button (or firmware update notification) on the device card on the Home screen.
Observe that the Device Settings page opens with the Software Update tab expanded.
Verify that an 'Update All' button is displayed at the top of the Software Update section.
Verify that separate 'Update' buttons are shown for the headset and for the charge case.
Wait for the single-step DFU process to complete for both the headset and charge case.
After completion, check that both devices are on the latest firmware version.
expected: The Device Settings page opens with the Software Update tab expanded, showing an 'Update All' button at the top and individual 'Update' buttons for the headset and charge case. Tapping 'Update All' initiates a single-step DFU process that completes successfully for both devices, leaving them on the latest firmware.
